val_command: cp ../../../ml_tasks/Privacy_opacus/train_eval_baseline.py ./ && mv opacus opacus_src 2>/dev/null; python train_eval_baseline.py --split val; mv opacus_src opacus 2>/dev/null; true
test_command: cp ../../../ml_tasks/Privacy_opacus/train_eval_baseline.py ./ && mv opacus opacus_src 2>/dev/null; python train_eval_baseline.py --split test; mv opacus_src opacus 2>/dev/null; true
